name: impact-monorepo
description: I.M.P.A.C.T. — privacy-first local AI environment scanner

scripts.build: npm run build -w @impact/schemas && npm run build -w @impact/scanner-host && npm run build -w @impact/scanner-runtimes && npm run build -w @impact/scanner-tools && npm run build -w @impact/scanner-models && npm run build -w @impact/privacy && npm run build -w @impact/reporting && npm run build -w @impact/submission && npm run build -w @impact/core && npm run build -w @impact/cli && npm run build -w @impact/ingest && npm run build -w @impact/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @impact/schemas && npm run test -w @impact/core && npm run test -w @impact/reporting && npm run test -w @impact/submission && npm run test -w @impact/ingest
scripts.verify:release: npm run lint && npm run build && npm test && npm run validate-fixtures && npm run validate-invalid-fixtures
scripts.dev:ingest: npm run build -w @impact/schemas && npm run build -w @impact/ingest && npm run start -w @impact/ingest
